notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.18.5 New Plate Solver Option: GAIA DB platesolving. This is the new default in house SASpro option. It uses your installed GAIA DB files to accurately plate solve your image, requires the initial fits header information or manual seed, much like PI image solver. For a blind solve it then fallback to ASTAP blindsolving, finally to astrometry.net.

Other major updates are included in: Display Stretch logic, WCS in geometry changes, History Explorer, Image Peeker, Live Stacking, Stacking Suite, Whats In My Image, bug fixes in minimized shelf, syqon, runtime torch, and more.
